message:
feat(types): QSBR domain primitive (safe variant) (IMPL-18 / AG-4C)

Mutex-protected retirement + atomic epoch. Pure QSBR would need unsafe
(raw thread_local); this safe variant pays a small mutex cost on retire
and reclaim but keeps reader guards lock-free. PageData integration is
follow-up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
